overview.zh: 强力对辊破碎机专为中等硬度物料细碎设计，采用双辊挤压原理工作。结构紧凑，维护简便，辊面采用耐磨合金钢制造，使用寿命长。适用于较硬物料的细碎作业，具有高效节能特点。
overview.en: Heavy Duty Double Roller Crusher is designed for fine crushing of medium hardness materials using dual roller compression. Compact structure, easy maintenance, with wear-resistant alloy steel rollers for long service life. Suitable for crushing harder materials with high efficiency and energy savings.

note.zh: 备注: 以上为强力对辊破碎机的技术参数，可根据客户需求定制其他规格。
note.en: Note: The above are the technical parameters of the heavy duty double roller crusher. Other specifications can be customized according to customer requirements.

zh: 高强度合金钢辊面，耐磨性强
液压调节装置，灵活控制排料粒度
自动过载保护系统，防止异物损坏
密封性能好，减少粉尘污染
双电机独立驱动，结构可靠
en: High-strength alloy steel rollers with superior wear resistance
Hydraulic adjustment for flexible discharge size control
Automatic overload protection against foreign objects
Excellent sealing to reduce dust pollution
Dual independent motors with reliable structure

description.zh: 适用于中硬物料的细碎和中碎作业，处理各类矿石。
description.en: Suitable for fine and medium crushing of medium-hard materials and various ores.

description.zh: 广泛用于冶金和化工行业的物料破碎处理。
description.en: Widely used in metallurgical and chemical industries for material crushing.

description.zh: 水泥生产线中石灰石、黏土等原料细碎和制砂。
description.en: Fine crushing of limestone, clay and sand production in cement production lines.

description.zh: 处理抗压强度不超过160MPa的各类脆性物料。
description.en: Processing various brittle materials with compressive strength below 160MPa.
